hero.headline: I build AI-driven products & automation.
hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer turning language models, APIs and infrastructure into products people actually use.

about.label: About
about.title: Engineering products end to end
paragraphs: I'm a full-stack engineer focused on AI and automation. I enjoy taking an idea all the way from infrastructure to interface — designing APIs, wiring up language models, and shipping interfaces that feel fast and intentional.

Over the last few years I've built and operated production systems that combine LLMs, messaging platforms and self-hosted infrastructure: WhatsApp automation, customer-response bots, and the DevOps glue that keeps them running reliably.
I care about clean architecture, pragmatic trade-offs and writing code that other people can read. I'm currently open to roles where I can own meaningful problems end to end.

skills.title: Tools I work with
skills.subtitle: A pragmatic, product-oriented stack — from the database to the pixels.

contact.title: Let's build something together
contact.subtitle: I'm open to full-time roles, freelance work and interesting collaborations. The fastest way to reach me is email.
